question: What does ASARA stand for in Forethought's research, and what does it refer to?
accepted_phrasings: AI Systems for AI R&D Automation
AI that fully automates AI research
AI capable of replacing every human researcher with 30 equally capable AI systems each thinking 30X human speed
AI Systems for AI R&D Automation - AI that can fully automate AI research

expected_citation.title: How quick and big would a software intelligence explosion be?

source_passage: We use the term *ASARA* to refer to AI that can fully automate AI research (ASARA = "AI Systems for AI R&D Automation"). For concreteness, we define ASARA as AI that can replace every human researcher at an AI company with 30 equally capable AI systems each thinking 30X human speed.
